parameters.query:
INSERT INTO opportunities (project_id, opp_type, title, url, funder, status, relevance_score, notes, raw_data, discovered_at)
SELECT
  p.id,
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  'open',
  3,
  $5,
  $6::jsonb,
  NOW()
FROM projects p
WHERE p.slug = $7
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM opportunities o WHERE o.url = $3
)
RETURNING id, title;
